title: Poetry
lyrics: Just poetry, just poetry, think about the ways to say the right, think about the ways to save the fight, just poetry, you know, make one of yourself so you know it don't fade, all the times it got cold, all the times it got warm, putting down your thoughts never harm no one, unless they aren't, can't understand the way that you can think, I don't think anyone ever could, you gotta do that to make people understand you, part of the whole thing of us getting together what we knew, yeah, sometimes the poetry rocks your mind right, sometimes the poetry reminds you of the dark nights, sometimes a poem comes from a poet you don't even know it, and then you show it, then you relate, you call it empathy and we all get together and live free, but that's not how it all goes down when the poetry inside your brain isn't what you put out there, and what you show you're just telling yourself the wrong story, poetry isn't different for the both of you, fully, you're telling yourself a different story, try another one, maybe you'll find the outcome, it took drugs to get here, it took drugs to break it down, till you have fear, till you can recognize it there, so you're not thinking that it's something you do right, it's something you do wrong, it's natural to have it, natural to sing the song, natural to understand all of it all along, it's just another piece of the puzzle, you write down inside your brain, you should share it, cause the poetry of all, just poetry of all, language barriers, no fight, there's not fear, hey, poetry of me, poetry of dreams, it's all coming from a poet from another to another, if we can just, read our lines a little soft, poetry inside our brains, read our lines a little soft, and tell us that we are insane, it's a good way to be, a good thing to feel, when you're different than the cloud, and you know you can heal, oh it's like the greatest thing to your ears, it's what made us the vibrations of it all, oh yeah, feeling that inside your heart and all of your veins, yeah, connected to the world, connected to desire, connected to education, thoughts and criminal behavior, doesn't matter if you're soft, what you want, just start, whatever today is, tomorrow will hold, whatever you think, yeah, it's where you go, in the end, it's poetry to me, like it's poetry to you, nowhere to go, until you write your story, find you around the lines of the poet, just poetry in it, a way, a painter passing through, all I am is a painter passing through, little bit of history, I don't want it to be history, it should be our story, see, poetry of poets, cause I'm poeting, poetry of knowing that my soul that I'm pouring in, all is poetry, so I'm your poet, subscribe, motherfucking sandals, I'm high, in the sky, like a sandals trip, you know what I'm saying, like, fuck, take me to the Bahamas, motherfucker, Poe, that nigga ain't going to Bahamas, no, Poe, that nigga ain't going no more Bahamas.
